prestazioni: K20A2 (2.0L DOHC i-VTEC) engine rebuild with forged internals: JE 87mm forged pistons (11.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and a Kelford 264/264 camshaft set for high-RPM power (8,800 RPM redline). Paired with a Toda Racing lightweight flywheel and Spec Stage 3+ clutch for rapid rev matching.

Forced induction via a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) on a custom RevHard Motorsports manifold, with a GReddy Type-S intercooler (55mm core) and a Tomei 3-inch titanium exhaust system (catless downpipe, 76mm mid-pipe, and 80mm rear section). Boost controlled at 18 psi via an AEM X-Series boost controller and logged with a Hondata KPro V4 ECU (custom 3-bar MAP sensor calibration).

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (8-position rebound, 20-way compression damping), Cusco 22mm front / 18mm rear sway bars, and SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, rear trailing arms). Braking upgraded to StopTech ST-60 big brake kit (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with DBA 5000 Series rotors and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Type-S specific, with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and overfenders) paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (Type-S vented, 50% weight reduction) and a custom 3M Matte Pearl White wrap (PPF-protected high-wear areas).

Voltex Type-5 rear wing (1,200mm width, 3D carbon fiber, adjustable angle) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals, with a custom front splitter (carbon fiber, 3-inch overhang) and a Cusco front lip spoiler (Type-S specific, ABS plastic with carbon weave overlay).

Interior stripped and rebuilt with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved), Takata Drift Series 4-point harnesses, and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede). Full custom roll cage (1.75-inch DOM tubing, TIG-welded) by Hardrock Race Cars, with a custom center console housing an AiM MXS Strada dash (data logging, shift lights, and lap timer).
